title: PowerShell Empire / Post-Exploitation Framework Indicators
description: Detects PowerShell scriptblock patterns associated with Empire, Metasploit, Cobalt Strike, and similar post-exploitation frameworks. These include Invoke-Expression with obfuscated payloads, common agent check-in patterns, and in-memory assembly loading (T1059.001).
falsepositives: Legitimate PowerShell scripts using WebClient for updates
